title: Fix order data
description: Check what needs fixing for this order, then apply fixes. Workflow status is not changed.
stepCheckOrderData: Check order data — see what fixes are needed.
stepCompleteOrderItemPieces: Complete order item pieces — add or remove piece rows so each item has the correct number of pieces.
checkHint: Preview changes without modifying data. Recommended first.
runHint: Apply fixes to this order now.
checkResultBadge: Preview only — no changes were made
successWithChanges: Done. Items adjusted: {items}. Pieces added: {added}. Pieces removed: {removed}.
errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
sectionPiecesDesc: Add or remove piece rows so each item has the correct number of pieces.
sectionProductNamesDesc: Restore missing product names from the product catalog for items created before name tracking.
detailsItemsWouldBeFixed: {count} item(s) would have product names restored
